page: Microsoft Azure D64lds_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the Dldsv7 family. It is powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor operating at 4.2 GHz, featuring 32 physical cores and 64 vCPUs via hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 128 GB of system memory, yielding a low memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per vCPU. It features a substantial 480 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions for accelerated vector and matrix operations.

This instance comes equipped with 3780 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. In benchmark evaluations, the D64lds_v7 demonstrates strong multi-core performance, achieving a top-tier Passmark CPU score of 83,685.33 and a top-tier single-threaded gzip compression rate of 35.76 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth is also robust, with uncached large-block read speeds reaching 311.23 GB/sec.

Given its high compute density relative to memory capacity, the D64lds_v7 is highly cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive RAM footprints. The combination of 64 dedicated vCPUs and 3780 GB of local storage makes it well-suited for high-throughput web serving, database operations, and multi-threaded decompression tasks. It is also capable of handling medium-to-large LLM prompt processing workloads efficiently due to its built-in AMX instruction support.
description: The Microsoft Azure D64lds_v7 is a compute-focused virtual machine from the Dldsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 64 vCPUs clocked at 4.2 GHz, paired with 128 GB of RAM and a large 3780 GB local storage disk. With a low memory-to-CPU ratio of 2 GB per core, this instance is optimized for compute-heavy tasks. It delivers top-tier performance in CPU benchmarks, single-threaded compression, and multi-threaded decompression. Supported by advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX, the D64lds_v7 is highly efficient for workloads such as high-throughput web serving, database operations, and medium-scale machine learning inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D64lds_v7 is a compute-optimized server featuring 64 vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage, delivering top-tier CPU performance for database and web serving workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D64lds_v7 is a compute-optimized instance with 64 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage for high-throughput workloads.
tagline: A high-compute, low-memory virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and substantial local storage for intensive processing workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 64 vCPUs at 4.2 GHz
128 GB system memory optimized for compute-heavy tasks
Bundled 3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction support for accelerated mathematical operations
Top-tier performance in single-threaded compression and multi-core CPU benchmarks
Best suited for database operations, high-throughput web serving, and multi-threaded decompression
